calendar.matters:
Petition To Terminate Estate Proceedings
Off Calendar Aug-30-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 281694. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for Public Administrator. Fees exceed the estate. Counsel stipulated to take what is there and not to ask for fees in the David Clark estate. He will prepare an order. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
